---
title: "Creating your personal website using Quarto"
subtitle: "RLadies+ Santa Barbara"
author: 
  - name: Sam Shanny-Csik
    url: https://samanthacsik.github.io/
    orcid: 0000-0002-5300-3075
date: May 13, 2026
format: 
  html:
    #glamour-html: default
    theme: RLadies-styles.scss
    mainfont: "Poppins"
    #backgroundcolor: "#ededf4"
    toc: true
    toc-location: left
    toc-depth: 3
    smooth-scroll: true
---

<br>

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
*This document is based on teaching material originally developed for the Bren School of Environmental Science & Management’s [Master of Environmental Data Science](https://bren.ucsb.edu/masters-programs/master-environmental-data-science/academics-meds){target="_blank"} (MEDS) program. It combines content from three longer-form workshops -- [Creating your personal website using Quarto](https://ucsb-meds.github.io/creating-quarto-websites/){target="_blank"}, [Customizing Quarto websites](https://ucsb-meds.github.io/customizing-quarto-websites/#/title-slide){target="_blank"}, and [Adding a blog to your existing Quarto website](https://samanthacsik.github.io/posts/2022-10-24-quarto-blogs/){target="_blank"} -- and covers creating a personal website using Quarto, adding a blog, customizing colors & fonts using Sass, and deploying (for free!) using GitHub Pages. Check out the original workshops for additional details and examples.* 
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
```{r}
#| eval: true
#| echo: false
#| fig-align: "center"
#| out-width: "75%"
knitr::include_graphics(here::here("images", "RLadies_hex.jpeg"))
```

```{r}
#| eval: false
#| echo: false
#| fig-align: "center"
#| out-width: "50%"
knitr::include_graphics(here::here("images", "RLadies+.png"))
```
:::

:::

<br>

{{< include /sections/0-setup.qmd >}}

{{< include /sections/1-create-scaffolding.qmd >}}

{{< include /sections/2-publish-with-github-pages.qmd >}}

{{< include /sections/3-update-home-page.qmd >}}

{{< include /sections/4-additional-configs.qmd >}}

{{< include /sections/5-add-a-blog.qmd >}}

{{< include /sections/6-customize.qmd >}}

{{< include /sections/7-republish.qmd >}}
